blockers.description: 5 of 8 required WOFF2 files missing: bloc-bold-regular.woff2, bloc-bold-bold.woff2, mont-regular.woff2, mont-medium.woff2, mont-bold.woff2
blockers.workaround: None acceptable. D-01/D-02 require provenance-traceable foundry downloads. Substitution (e.g. Montserrat for Mont) is explicitly rejected — different typeface and violates brand contract.

human_actions_pending.context: Martin holds the Fontfabric commercial web self-hosting license per D-01. Only he can authenticate into the foundry portal.

human_actions_pending.context: Task 1 auto-verifies file presence; if all 8 exist, plan 02-02 proceeds through Tasks 2+3 autonomously. Optional bloc-bold-black.woff2 triggers automatic weight-900 wiring if present.

decisions.decision: Baloo 2 sourced from google-webfonts-helper (gwfh.mranftl.com) — latin subset WOFF2 preconverted from Google Fonts' canonical v23 release
decisions.rationale: Google Fonts CSS2 API returns TTF to non-Chrome UAs and would require a local TTF→WOFF2 conversion step (brew install woff2 or pip install fonttools brotli). gwfh bypasses that with OFL-compliant pre-converted WOFF2. Same OFL source, no licensing ambiguity.

decisions.decision: Refused to source Bloc Bold + Mont WOFF2 files from any third-party web source
decisions.rationale: D-01 confirms these are commercially licensed by Martin through Zetafonts (Bloc Bold) and Fontfabric (Mont). Pirated WOFF2 copies of both are trivially findable online, but license provenance is tied to the foundry account owner, not the file bytes. A foundry crawler spotting an unlicensed deployment on proactivsports.com would void the paid license. D-02's 'Martin provisions' gate exists precisely to enforce this traceability.

decisions.decision: Rejected substituting Montserrat (Google Fonts OFL) for Mont (Fontfabric commercial)
decisions.rationale: Montserrat by Julieta Ulanovsky and Mont by Fontfabric are different typefaces with different metrics, x-heights, and weights. UI-SPEC §1.7 + D-01 specify Mont. Silent substitution would misrepresent the brand and fail any design-review against the approved mocks.

next_action: User downloads Bloc Bold (Zetafonts portal) + Mont (Fontfabric/MyFonts portal) web kits, places 5 renamed WOFF2 files into assets/brand/fonts/. Then run /gsd-resume-work or /gsd-execute-phase 2. Task 1 will re-verify file presence; if all 8 present, proceed to Tasks 2+3 autonomously.
context_notes: Phase 02 Wave 1 is 2/3 done (02-01 ✓ brand tokens, 02-03 ✓ stock shadcn primitives). 02-02 (self-hosted typography) is the last Wave 1 plan, gated on D-02 human-action font provisioning. This session: user asked to auto-source fonts. I sourced Baloo 2 legitimately (OFL), pushed back hard on sourcing Bloc Bold + Mont from any third-party web location (licensing traceability). Local filesystem search turned up no Bloc or Mont — only Montserrat (wrong typeface). Only the two foundry portals can legitimately produce the remaining 5 files. Wave 2 (02-04 + 02-05) is gated behind Wave 1, so this is a hard block on Phase 2 progress.
